name: Agent Delivery Engineering Predictive Reliability Framework (2607.07689)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Long-horizon LLM multi-agent systems face reliability risks invisible to infrastructure monitoring. We propose the ADE Predictive Reliability Framework (ADE-PRF), enabling proactive health trajectory prediction from passive degradation detection. ADE-PRF aggregates 20 heterogeneous signals across five layers into a Trust Margin metric (39.2-point dynamic range). Triple-method parallel prediction enables 8-hour forecasts. Production validation spans 380,227 predictions and 280,579 validations acr
